review_title: Ease of use. Almost 100% accuracy. Saved us time & money!. Support always there to help.
description: My headaches are gone! My inventory is near perfect. I have been promoted because of this. I have recommended it to other divisions in house and they are true believers.
author: Tim B.
pros: Ease of use. Time saver! My inventory is almost at 100% accuracy. Great support team. I have to submit monthly inventory reports to my superior. What I like best about Passport is that I can do everything in just a few clicks. I take inventory, I create the report and email it direct to my boss. All from this program. I am able to recieve alerts when I am low on a certain item. I went from 100's of 1000's of dollars missing to almost 100% accuracy on my inventory levels.

review_title: This software is good for basic usage.
description: I chose the small scanning devices at first, but it didn't seem to work as good as a basic barcode scanner. I recommend investing in a better scanner that you can also purchase from them.
author: Rowena F.
pros: It allows you to import and export information from inventory on the basic package. When you add on tracking assets, you can be sure to find all the company's information like serial number and where items are stored or being used.
cons: Sometimes I will be entering items received or issued and when I try to process the website freezes up and I have to re-enter the same information and my data gets lost. Time is wasted and so money is also wasted when this happens.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A product with loads of potential - anchored by glitches, problems, and poor service
description: The product support ([sensitive content hidden]) is amazing but the rest of the staff at ASAP Systems has very questionable communication and ethics. [sensitive content hidden], their technical support rep, is very slow to respond and can sometimes take months to offer solutions without giving you any updates in between. You could literally add a full time job to your staff of emailing [sensitive content hidden] for status updates that he never provides. They still cannot figure out how invoicing works and when something goes wrong, they will simply shut your system access off without notice.
author: Matt S.
pros: Integrated dashboards and a simple easy to learn interface
cons: The software itself has loads of potential that is only held back by its own engineering flaws and poor product execution. Sometimes the development team releases updates without proper testing that impacts the product in negative and downright frustrating ways. We have been unable to import records for months and our app randomly went down - the teenagers who operate it acted like this was no big deal. The product team is literally their own worse enemy.

author: Bob H.
pros: The ability to move an inventory item over to an asset... This software is COMPLETELY customizable to our company... Passport has an Inventory module, Asset module, a very robust Report module, and a Bar Coding module that is fully customizable... Once it is fully implemented into our business it will look as if this software was written completely for us...
cons: At this time, we have not experienced anything with this software that I would consider a Con... Our experience has been very good to this point...
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Such a powerful tool for a very reasonable price.
description: Very powerful and adaptive tool. If you are looking for a tool that allows you to customize to your operations verses you having to stay within pre-defined swim lanes, this is it. It has increased our accuracy and reduce touch labor. ASAP Systems support and user community have supported us with enhancements and customization of our reports. Multiple of our requests have been added in the updates at no added cost. Passport is very powerful tool and easily customized and all our users love the user interfaces. ASAP Systems also provided us with one on one support at very reasonable pricing and was extremely helpful to us.
author: Jim E.

description: My overall experience was below average. The company has the worst customer service I've ever seen. They neve answer the phone. They don't reply to emails. They overcharged me for wanting to add things that they should've had like being able to set a custom price for my items. Lastly, after 2 months of back and forth with training issues, I asked them to cancel and refund because i wasn't able to use the inventory system and they declined do i lost $1800 for a product i was never able to use. I hope other people steer away from this company and don't make the same mistake I did.
author: Gustavo D.
pros: The software was slow and hard to use. You can set custom pricing for your items. It is very time consuming to do simple processes.
cons: The software was slow and hard to use. You can set custom pricing for your items. It is very time consuming to do simple processes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Bruce W.
cons: Money was wasted with and still with no system that operates. The scanner also would not sync or operate as advertised. Training & support was spent fixing their system issues until, surprise, we would need to purchase more "support" to continue.

author: Jon P.
pros: Easy of use, user friendly, intuitive Friendly customer service reps People who know their stuff!
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: the price is so much according to the features
author: Mukesh K.
